subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-12
subcodes.first_line: People do not become submissive because of virtuous dictums; but rather, when they observe righteous deeds, they grow submissive. (DAS: Generally the people are not impressed by the words of the Divine Manifestation but if they hear about His actions they will humble themselves immediately.)
subcodes.first_line_orig: مردم از قول حق خاضع نمیشوند ولی اگر عمل حق ببینند خاضع میشوند
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
